query:
-- Step 1: Drop old columns from sanad_offices
ALTER TABLE sanad_offices
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS companyId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS managerId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS openingHours;

-- Step 2: Add new columns to sanad_offices (no AFTER references to new columns)
ALTER TABLE sanad_offices
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerType ENUM(
    'pro_office','typing_centre','admin_bureau','legal_services',
    'attestation','visa_services','business_setup','other'
  ) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pro_office',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS website VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contactPerson VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rating DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalOrders INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS openingHours VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isVerified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT;

-- Step 3: Update status default
ALTER TABLE sanad_offices
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('active','inactive','pending_approval','suspended') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active';

-- Step 4: Drop old columns from sanad_applications
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS officeId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicantId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicationNumber,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS type,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicantName,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicantNameAr;

-- Step 5: Add new columns to sanad_applications
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerId INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requestedById INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS referenceNumber VARCHAR(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS serviceType ENUM(
    'work_permit','work_permit_renewal','work_permit_cancellation',
    'labor_card','labor_card_renewal',
    'residence_visa','residence_visa_renewal','visit_visa','exit_reentry',
    'commercial_registration','commercial_registration_renewal','business_license',
    'document_typing','document_translation','document_attestation',
    'pasi_registration','omanisation_report','other'
  ) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS title VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS beneficiaryName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS beneficiaryNameAr VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS employeeId INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerNotes TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rating INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ratingComment TEXT;

-- Step 6: Update status enum
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM(
    'draft','submitted','in_progress','awaiting_documents',
    'awaiting_payment','completed','rejected','cancelled'
  ) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft';

-- Step 7: Populate referenceNumber for existing rows
UPDATE sanad_applications SET referenceNumber = CONCAT('SAN-MIGR-', id) WHERE referenceNumber IS NULL;

-- Step 8: Add unique constraint on referenceNumber
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications ADD UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sanad_ref (referenceNumber);

-- Step 9: Add new indexes
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sanad_provider (providerId),
  ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sanad_service_type (serviceType);
